CustomField.description: This is the first order date for this account - please note if there is a parent account, the first order date will pull from the parent. Note the automation to fill this field runs overnight, not instantly, so there is a delay.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This is the first order date for this account - please note if there is a parent account, the first order date will pull from the parent. Note the automation to fill this field runs overnight, not instantly, so there is a delay.
CustomField.label: First Order Date (Reporting)
